title: Evangelion Manga Question
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Manga Question             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Fri Aug 12, 2016 6:48 pm Hey guys!, So, I have an opportunity to do an independent study using Evangelion as my literary source. This is really exciting, but I need to know if the entire Evangelion manga series has been translated into English yet... (Sorry for such as noob question, I kinda lost track of the manga cuz of life stuff/the Rebuild films, etc.) Any help or advice to point in me in the right direction, will be greatly appreciated! \ Thanks, SawItAtAge10

[]: Re: Evangelion Manga Question             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Aug 12, 2016 7:47 pm It has. You can find the entire series as Viz's 3-in-1 collections and they're also available digitally on Comixology.

Article: Evangelion Manga Question
[]: Evangelion Manga Question             Quote Post by SawItAtAge10 » Fri Aug 12, 2016 6:48 pm Hey guys!, So, I have an opportunity to do an independent study using Evangelion as my literary source. This is really exciting, but I need to know if the entire Evangelion manga series has been translated into English yet... (Sorry for such as noob question, I kinda lost track of the manga cuz of life stuff/the Rebuild films, etc.) Any help or advice to point in me in the right direction, will be greatly appreciated! \ Thanks, SawItAtAge10

[]: Re: Evangelion Manga Question             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Aug 12, 2016 7:47 pm It has. You can find the entire series as Viz's 3-in-1 collections and they're also available digitally on Comixology.
